title: FundedNext Ramadan 2026: 15% OFF Stellar Challenges
description: Celebrate Ramadan with exclusive savings on the world's most flexible prop firm. Use code HOLY15 for deep discounts on Stellar challenges and start your path to professional funding with 95% profit splits.

payout_policy.details: First payout available after 7 days for Stellar 1-Step. Profit split up to 95%. Bonus 15% share during evaluation stage included.

seo_content:
FundedNext Ramadan 2026 15% OFF Deal

FundedNext is celebrating Ramadan 2026 with an exclusive 15% discount on Stellar challenge accounts using code HOLY15. This seasonal promotion applies to the full Stellar lineup, from the 2K entry level up to the 25K tier, making it one of the most accessible discount periods of the year for traders looking to enter or expand their funded trading portfolio with one of the world's most flexible prop firms.

FundedNext is a globally recognized proprietary trading firm founded in March 2022 and backed by institutional liquidity. With over 57,000 verified reviews and a trust score of 4.5, the firm has established itself as one of the most reputable names in the prop trading industry. FundedNext operates a UAE-based regulatory framework and supports traders across four major platforms: cTrader, Match Trader, MT4, and MT5.

With code HOLY15, you receive 15% off Stellar challenge accounts in the 2K-25K size range. FundedNext's Stellar challenges offer a standout feature that no other firm matches: a 15% profit share during the evaluation phase itself — meaning you earn a portion of your gains even before becoming funded. Once funded, the profit split climbs to a market-leading 95%. The Stellar 1-Step drops to $186.99 (from $219.99), and the Stellar 2-Step $100K becomes $494.99 (from $549.99) with this code.

FundedNext's trading rules are built around flexibility: no consistency rules on Stellar accounts, news trading allowed during the evaluation phase, weekend holding permitted, and EA use supported with customization requirements. Payouts begin after just 7 days for Stellar 1-Step accounts and are processed through Crypto, RiseWorks, and TC Pay. The minimum payout is $20, and processing typically takes 7-14 days. Copy trading is allowed between your own accounts, and the inactivity rule requires a login every 30 days.

To claim this Ramadan discount, visit FundedNext via the affiliate link above, select your preferred Stellar challenge account size, and enter HOLY15 at checkout. The 15% savings will be applied immediately. Note that news trading is restricted during the funded stage under a 40% profit split rule, and switching between EA and manual trading across the same evaluation is not permitted. The promotion expired on March 3, 2026 — verify current code availability on the FundedNext site before purchasing.
